subcodes.first_line: O Thou Divine Healer! I beseech Thee by the light of Thy Countenance, and the radiance of Thy Face, and the splendor of Thy Cause, and the oceans of Thy mercy, and the stream of Thy loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا شافی اسئلک بنور وجهک و ضیاء طلعتک و بهاء امرک و بحور رحمتک و فرات عنایتک
